sections.paragraph:
Κάρπος, ου, ὁ (Artem. 3, 38; SIG2 438, 20; InsHierap 129; coin fr. Magnesia [Thieme 40]; pap [Preisigke, Namenbuch]) Carpus, a Christian in Troas 2 Ti 4:13.—LGPN I. M-M.

Artem Artem , onir., II a.d.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

  1. fr. = from

Thieme Thieme = GT., Die Inschriften von Magnesia am Mäander und das NT—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Preisigke, Preisigke, Namenbuch = Namenbuch 1922

LGPN LGPN = A Lexicon of Greek Personal Names—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 509
